channel.title: Heidelberg on Swing Dance Events in and around Heidelberg
channel.description: Recent content in Heidelberg on Swing Dance Events in and around Heidelberg

item.title: Social Practice Time
item.description:
Weekly social organized by Laura. Social dancing to DJ music in Heidelberg in a nice location close to the train station in Heidelberg.

  • Address (Kurfürsten-Anlage 58, 69115 Heidelberg
  • Cost: Entry is a sliding scale between 3€ and 10€.
  • Time:
    • Start: 9 p.m.
    • End: 11 p.m.

item.title: 'Boost Your Solo' Workshop
item.description:
This workshop, focused on solo dancing to jazz music, offers a unique blend of classes and practice time that help you see real progress right away.

During the classes, Kris will share her latest understanding of the dance to spark new ideas. Then, in the practice sessions, she’ll provide the time and support you need to incorporate these insights into your dancing and allow you to develop your own unique style.

  • Link to the Workshop
  • Address: Kurfürsten-Anlage 58, 69115 Heidelberg
  • Cost: 100€, 70€ if you have a regular Full Pass at SwingStep
  • Time: November 22 and November 23, 2025, the times are for each day
    • Start: 2:00 p.m.
    • End: 5:30 p.m.

item.title: Gipsy Jazz Jam Session
item.description:
• Address: Emil-Maier-Straße 16, 69115 Heidelberg
  • Cost: 10€ (?)
  • Time:
    • Start: 8 p.m.
    • End: approx. 11 p.m.

item.title: Chapel Swing
item.description:
Social dance in an ancient church that has been remodelled to fit festivities. Dance to DJ music in a special location!

  • Address: Rheinstraße 12/4, 69126 Heidelberg
  • Cost: Donation based
  • Time:
    • Taster at 4 p.m.
    • Social Dancing from 5 p.m. until about 10 p.m.

item.title: Halloween Social
item.description:
🎃Spooky Halloween Social 🎃 More than welcome to wear a costume!

  • Address: Kurfürsten-Anlage 58, 69115 Heidelberg
  • Cost: Entry is a sliding scale between 3€ and 10€.
  • Time:
    • Start: 9 p.m.
    • End: Midnight…
